name: Bauhaus Bold
description: Pure off-white surface, primary-blue accent, and chunky Archivo Black display type. Bauhaus / brutalist modernist — best for opinionated manifestos and bold product pitches.
descriptionZh: 净色底 + 主色蓝强调色 + Archivo Black 黑体. 包豪斯 / 布鲁塔利风格, 适合观点鲜明的演讲与产品发布.

name: Blueprint
description: Deep navy backdrop with cyan accent and IBM Plex Mono. Engineering blueprint / industrial schematic vibe — best for system architecture and technical breakdowns.
descriptionZh: 深藏青底 + 青色强调色 + IBM Plex Mono. 工程蓝图 / 工业图纸气质, 适合系统架构与技术拆解.

name: Bold Signal
description: Dark gradient backdrop with a hot orange focal card and Archivo Black / Space Grotesk typography. Signature: oversized orange focal card as the stage's anchor + tabular section numbers. Built for pitch decks, product launches and statement chapters.
descriptionZh: 暗渐变底 + 大橙色焦点色卡 + Archivo Black / Space Grotesk 字体。签名：占位主角色卡 + 大编号制表数。适合 pitch deck、产品发布、宣言型章节。
bestFor: 产品发布 / 新品宣传

name: Chalk Garden
description: Dark slate chalkboard backdrop with handwritten Patrick Hand typography and a chalk-yellow accent. Friendly classroom / explainer vibe.
descriptionZh: 深色石板底 + Patrick Hand 手写字体 + 粉笔黄强调色. 教室 / 课堂讲解风.

name: Creative Voltage
description: Saturated electric-blue canvas with neon-yellow accent and Syne / Space Mono typography. Signature: halftone dot pattern (retro-punk creative studio). Built for design weeks, creative-studio decks and visual culture talks.
descriptionZh: 饱和电光蓝底 + 霓虹黄强调 + Syne 几何衬线 / Space Mono 等宽。签名：halftone 网点纹理（复古朋克工作室感）。适合设计周、创意工作室、视觉文化话题。
bestFor: 视觉文化 / 字体话题
复古朋克 / 街头文化

name: Dark Botanical
description: Premium editorial dark with elegant Cormorant italic and warm terracotta / blush / gold accents. Soft blurred light pools as the signature — magazine-cover sophistication for fashion, lifestyle, brand storytelling.
descriptionZh: 高级感暗底 + Cormorant 斜体衬线 + 暖陶 / 玫粉 / 鎏金叠层。签名：柔光晕染 (blurred light pool)。气质介于时尚刊物封面与博物馆图录之间。

name: Dune
description: Charcoal-brown on desert sand — near-accent-less restraint. Inter sans display + Source Serif body. Architecture portfolio / gallery brochure / desert dusk aesthetic — quiet, sophisticated, design-first.
descriptionZh: 炭褐当墨 + 沙底，几乎不用 accent —— 克制、高级。Inter 显示 + Source Serif 正文。像建筑作品集、画廊手册、沙漠黄昏的色温。
bestFor: 建筑 / 室内 / 空间
艺术展览 / 画廊手册
设计师 / 工作室作品集

name: Electric Studio
description: Clean white canvas with single electric-blue accent and Manrope sans throughout. Signature: 4px electric-blue accent bar baked into the bottom of the stage — corporate confidence without coldness.
descriptionZh: 净白底 + 单一电光蓝 + Manrope 全场。签名：贴底 4px 电蓝色块。企业感、清晰、自信，不冷漠，适合 B2B 与投资人场景。
bestFor: 企业财报 / 季度更新
行业研究 / 趋势报告

name: Forest Ink
description: Deep-forest-green ink on ivory cream — the green IS the ink. Source Serif body + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC display. Reads like a vintage National Geographic issue — sustainable, grounded, considered.
descriptionZh: 深森林绿当墨（绿就是字色本身）+ 象牙暖纸。Source Serif 正文 + Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC。像旧版《国家地理》，沉稳、有呼吸感、克制。
bestFor: 自然 / 可持续 / 环保

name: Indigo Porcelain
description: Deep-indigo ink on porcelain white — the indigo IS the ink, not just an accent. Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans body. Academic, scholarly, like a Chinese journal of contemporary thought.
descriptionZh: 深靛蓝当墨（靛蓝就是字色本身，而非 accent）+ 瓷白纸。Playfair Display + Noto Serif SC + IBM Plex Sans。学术、有深度，像蓝印花瓷器或一本当代思想期刊。
bestFor: 学术 / 研究 / 论文解读
AI / 数据 / 工程深度
技术发布会 / 严肃汇报
思想型 / 评论型长文改编

name: Kraft Paper
description: Deep-brown ink on kraft beige — old notebook / hand-stamped envelope. Fraunces serif + Noto Serif SC + Source Serif body. Vintage, warm, hand-crafted, with a copper accent for editorial emphasis.
descriptionZh: 深棕当墨 + 牛皮米。像老笔记本或手戳信封：暖、有年代感、手作味。Fraunces + Noto Serif SC + Source Serif 正文 + 紫铜色 accent。
bestFor: 历史 / 怀旧 / 老物
手工艺 / 食物 / 农产品

name: Midnight Press
description: Warm dark backdrop with a single hot accent. Cinematic, terminal-y, developer vibe.
descriptionZh: 暖色暗底 + 单一热橙强调色。电影感、终端气质、开发者审美。

name: Monochrome Print
description: Off-white paper with ink-black serif text and a single ink-blue accent. High-contrast print magazine vibe — Monocle, Wallpaper, MIT Press. Quiet, sophisticated, considered.
descriptionZh: 微暖白底 + 墨黑 serif + 单一墙墨蓝强调色. 高对比印刷杂志气质, Monocle / Wallpaper / MIT Press 那种沉静讲究.

name: Neon Cyber
description: Deep-navy canvas with electric cyan + magenta glow and Clash Display + Satoshi typography. Signature: cyan grid + dual-tone neon outline. Futurist cyberpunk for AI, web3, security and future-tech content.
descriptionZh: 深海军底 + 电光青 + 玫红双霓虹 + Clash Display / Satoshi 字体。签名：青色发光网格 + 双色霓虹描边。赛博朋克未来派审美。
bestFor: 赛博朋克 / 科幻话题

name: Newsroom
description: Newsprint cream backdrop with ink-black serif type and a banner red accent. Old-school broadsheet / documentary feel — feels like a New York Times feature article.
descriptionZh: 报纸奶油底 + 墨黑 serif + 报头红强调色. 老派大报 / 纪录片气质, 像一篇 NYT 特稿.

name: Paper Press
description: Warm cream backdrop with a single hot accent. Editorial magazine, gentle, daytime vibe.
descriptionZh: 暖色奶油底 + 单一热橙强调色。杂志气质、柔和日间审美。

name: Pastel Dream
description: Soft pastel canvas with cream card and a single sage-green accent. Plus Jakarta Sans throughout, generous rounded cards. Signature: faint multi-tone pill ribbon along one edge — friendly without being saccharine.
descriptionZh: 柔粉蓝灰底 + 奶油卡 + 单一鼠尾草绿强调色 + Plus Jakarta Sans。签名：单边多色 pill 色条。友好但不腻，适合女性向 / 教学 / onboarding。
bestFor: 友好教学 / 知识科普
心理 / 健康 / 母婴

name: Split Canvas
description: Two-tone canvas: warm peach + cool lavender as paired surfaces. Outfit sans display, magenta accent. Signature: dual-tone surface (left peach / right lavender) — built for contrast and dialog chapters.
descriptionZh: 双色画布：暖蜜桃 + 冷薰衣草作为成对底色 + Outfit 几何无衬线 + 玫红强调。签名：双调底色（左桃 / 右紫），适合做对照与对话型章节。

name: Sunset Zine
description: Warm peach paper backdrop with a magenta accent and chunky Fraunces serif. Indie magazine / risograph zine vibe — playful, expressive, character-forward.
descriptionZh: 暖蜗色纸底 + 玫红强调色 + 厚体 Fraunces serif. 独立杂志 / 丝网印 zine 风, 俏皮有人情味.

name: Swiss IKB
description: Swiss International Style. Ultra-thin 200-weight Inter / Helvetica, crisp warm-white canvas, IKB (International Klein Blue) as the single high-saturation accent. Signature: 1px hairline grid + 200-weight hero numbers. Massimo Vignelli + Helvetica Forever energy.
descriptionZh: 瑞士国际主义风。**极细 200 weight** Inter / Helvetica + 净暖白底 + 克莱因蓝（IKB）单一锚点色。签名：1px 发丝网格 + 200 重字 hero 数字。Massimo Vignelli / Helvetica Forever 那种克制冷静。
bestFor: 年度总结 / 数据汇报
设计 / 工程领域分享
严肃学术 / 国际化品牌
信息驱动设计 / 信息图

name: Terminal Green
description: True-black backdrop with phosphor-green accent and JetBrains Mono everywhere. Matrix / hacker / 80s terminal vibe — best for technical demos and CLI walkthroughs.
descriptionZh: 纯黑底 + 磷光绿强调色, 全程等宽字体. Matrix 黑客 / 80 年代终端感, 最适合技术演示与 CLI 教程.

name: Vintage Editorial
description: Witty editorial cream canvas with chunky italic Fraunces and a warm terracotta accent. Signature: hairline geometric overlay (circle + line + dot). Personality-forward, conversational — like a magazine columnist who knows you'll laugh.
descriptionZh: 奶油底 + 厚体 Fraunces 斜体 + 暖陶强调色，有性格、会说话。签名：细线几何叠层（圆 + 线 + 点）。介于杂志专栏与艺术评论之间，俏皮、自信、有声音。
bestFor: 文化随笔 / 美学话题

name: Warm Keynote
description: Cream paper backdrop with a single teal accent and a soft warm grid drawn on the stage. SaaS keynote / editorial vibe.
descriptionZh: 奶油纸底 + 单一青色强调色 + 舞台上的暖色网格. SaaS Keynote 与编辑器气质.
